name: Katie Dowd, Hillary for America
subject: I hope you’ll share this with someone special
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Watch this video: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjI2MjMzNTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwOTM2MTQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0) I've always looked up to my mom.

Growing up, she worked full time but still came home every night with enough energy to keep up with my sister and me. I probably don't tell her this enough, but she's my role model.

One of my best days was getting to tell my mom I was going to work to help elect Hillary -- a candidate who fights for equal pay, for women's rights, and champions women and families.

To see her face that day -- how proud she was of me, and proud to be supporting Hillary -- that meant everything.

**[As you celebrate today, I hope you'll take a moment to watch this video -- complete with exclusive footage of Hillary as a little girl -- then share it with someone who's made a difference in your life:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2MjMzNTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwOTM2MTQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2MjMzNTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwOTM2MTQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/happy-mothers-day](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2MjMzNTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwOTM2MTQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Katie

Katie Dowd
Digital Director
Hillary for America

P.S. -- Happy Mother's Day, Mom.
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI2MjMzNTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwOTM2MTQ3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
